meaning: n.头天晚上adj.通宵的,晚上的,前夜的adv.在前一夜,整夜,昨晚一晚上
examples: I camped overnight in a field.
I usually soak the beans overnight.
The challenge is, the more people that are working overnight, the more support services you need.
Berman started at ABC News as a desk assistant working the overnight shift in 1995.
